title: bromus riparius subsp. villosellus
intro: Bromus riparius subsp. villosellus, commonly known as hairy-cheeked brome, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Bromus riparius subsp. villosellus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
